propositions: Run the ADR-0036 version-segmented threshold replay for the plan-v2 impact model (calibration 3) and adjudicate current blocking thresholds against it.
Extend the calibration script to count skipped sidecars by reason (different-version vs untagged) and print the skipped remainder alongside segment size.
Adjudicate each non-DET blocking-tier criterion to KEEP/RAISE/LOWER/DEMOTE via a pre-registered decision rule, citing each criterion's replay-row signals.
No criterion reaches BLOCK-ELIGIBLE under plan-v2; the net result is one demotion (T5e to advisory) and ten keeps.
Recompute impact_plan with the hard-override floor disabled to measure floor-driven block count/share overall and for ac_unverifiable-bearing findings.
Classify ac_unverifiable floor-driven finding text into missing_oracle/underspecified_oracle/ambiguous and report the proportions.
